positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical mandalic representation of a cosmic forest. The central focus is a cluster of luminous, bioluminescent flora and abstract galactic elements. Use deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and accents of metallic gold and ultraviolet purple. The composition must feature clean, scalable silhouettes of crystalline trees, stylized crescent moons, and swirling nebulas, designed for high-contrast textile printing. The overall aesthetic should be ethereal, geometric, and intensely intricate, resembling a modern stained-glass window mixed with deep space art. Flat vectors, sharp focus, perfect symmetry, central composition, full-body print art.
negative: blur, bokeh, grainy, noise, text, signature, watermark, logo, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, cropped, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, realistic photo, writing, messy lines
